title: mesosphaerum marrubiastrum
intro: Mesosphaerum marrubiastrum, also known as lemon balm, is a perennial plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum marrubiastrum include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting sleep, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Mesosphaerum marrubiastrum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to relieve digestive issues, improve mood, and soothe skin irritations.
